title: Kenyan Ginger Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap filled with grilled chicken, steamed vegetables, and a hint of Kenyan ginger.

ingredients.name: steamed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots and green beans

instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together Kenyan ginger, salt, and pepper.
3. Rub the mixture all over the chicken breast.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, steam the vegetables for 3-5 minutes, or until tender.
6. Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Slice the grilled chicken into thin strips.
8. Assemble the wrap by spreading some of the steamed vegetables on the wrap, followed by the grilled chicken, and finishing with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro.
9. Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
